## Loading Tidyverse

this code chunk use pacman's p_load() to load tidyverse faimly of package into R environment


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pacman::p_load(tidyerse)
```
:::



::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
exam_data = read.csv("data/wk1/Exam_data.csv")
```
